scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @teacher-assistant/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @teacher-assistant/api" "npm run dev --workspace @teacher-assistant/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @teacher-assistant/shared && npm run build --workspace @teacher-assistant/api && npm run build --workspace @teacher-assistant/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @teacher-assistant/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @teacher-assistant/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @teacher-assistant/web
